title: Two-weight read: entry → form → full result
steps: Navigate to /clinic
Click 'Start a read' → lands on /clinic/read
Enter a valid DOB (e.g. 4 months ago), select sex
Enter weight #1 with a date, click '+ Add a second weight'
Enter weight #2 with a later date and a higher weight
Click 'Get read' → lands on /clinic/result
expected: Result screen shows percentile + z-score callout, WeightChart with both points plotted on the WHO curves, a TrendCard (gain, g/day), and a catch-up or maintenance projection. No error.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1 first — find root cause before touching code. 2) Check the navigation chain and that useClinicRead.submit() sets input before navigate('/clinic/result'). Most likely cause: state lost across route change or derivation throwing. Files: src/features/clinic/useClinicRead.ts, ClinicForm.tsx, ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: superpowers:verification-before-completion — run `npm test -- clinic` and confirm all pass.

title: E2E browser: two-weight read happy path
steps: Start the app: `npm run dev` (note the local URL, e.g. http://localhost:5173)
Open [DEV_URL]/clinic in the browser
Click 'Start a read'
Fill DOB, sex, two weights with valid dates
Click 'Get read'
expected: Browser shows the result screen with a visible percentile number, a rendered chart canvas/svg with two points, and a trend value. No console errors.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check WeightChart renders with only 1–2 entries (reused component may assume full history). Most likely cause: chart range/empty-data handling. Files: src/features/growth/WeightChart.tsx, ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: re-run /dev-browser flow and confirm chart renders.

title: CLM-1: Clinic Mode entry independent of parent data
steps: With no child profile present, navigate to /clinic
Observe the entry screen (it must NOT redirect to /onboarding)
Confirm a notice states nothing is saved and that it supports clinical judgment
expected: /clinic renders outside PrimaryLayout: no onboarding redirect, no bottom tabs, notice present.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check /clinic routes are registered OUTSIDE the PrimaryLayout children. Most likely cause: routes nested under the guarded layout. Files: src/app/routes.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- routing` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-2: DOB + sex + one weight yields percentile & z-score, no account/profile
steps: Go to /clinic/read
Enter DOB + sex + a single weight (no second weight)
Click 'Get read'
expected: Result shows a valid percentile and z-score; no name, account, or profile was required at any step.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check weightToZResult is called with age-in-days from DOB. Most likely cause: age computation or single-weight path. Files: useClinicRead.ts, lib/who/index.ts. After fix: run `npm test -- useClinicRead` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-3 / CLM-7: second weight produces trend & velocity
steps: Go to /clinic/read, enter DOB + sex + weight #1
Add weight #2 with a later date and higher weight
Get read
expected: TrendCard shows direction 'gain' and a positive g/day value computed between the two dated points.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check g/day = (w2-w1)/days; verify date diff. Most likely cause: date math or trend omitted. Files: useClinicRead.ts. After fix: run `npm test -- useClinicRead` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-6: entered weights plotted against WHO curves
steps: Produce a two-weight read and view /clinic/result
Inspect the chart
expected: WeightChart draws the 3rd/15th/50th/85th/97th curves for the selected sex and plots both entered points at the correct ages.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check ephemeral WeightEntry[] passed to WeightChart has valid dateMeasured/weightGrams. Most likely cause: malformed synthetic entries. Files: ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- ClinicResult` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-8: catch-up target shown; maintenance when on/above line
steps: Read 1: enter weights below the 3rd percentile → view result
Read 2 (New read): enter weights at/above the 50th percentile → view result
expected: Read 1 shows a catch-up target (g/day + g/week, caution amber). Read 2 shows maintenance framing (accent green), not a fabricated deficit.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check the catch-up vs maintenance branch in deriving ClinicCatchUp.mode. Most likely cause: branch threshold against the 3rd-percentile line. Files: useClinicRead.ts. After fix: run `npm test -- useClinicRead` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-9: non-diagnostic phrasing + disclaimer present
steps: View any /clinic/result
Read the callout sentence and the disclaimer note
expected: A visible notice states Clinic Mode supports, not replaces, clinical judgment. No copy asserts a diagnosis.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check the clinic i18n block wording and that the disclaimer renders. Most likely cause: missing copy key. Files: src/i18n/copy/en.ts, ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- ClinicResult` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-10: nothing is stored (ephemeral contract)
steps: Complete a read, then in the browser inspect localStorage and sessionStorage
Refresh the page on /clinic/result
Run the architecture guard test
expected: No clinic input/result keys appear in storage. Refresh clears state and redirects to /clinic/read. no-persistence.test.ts confirms no file under src/features/clinic imports from data/auth/lib/supabase.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check useClinicRead uses React state only and no forbidden imports exist. Most likely cause: a stray repository/localStorage import. Files: src/features/clinic/*. After fix: run `npm test -- no-persistence` and confirm pass.

title: CLM-11: one-tap reset (New read)
steps: Complete a read on /clinic/result
Click 'New read'
expected: Returns to a blank /clinic/read form with nothing pre-filled.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check reset() clears input and the form mounts empty. Most likely cause: stale form defaults. Files: useClinicRead.ts, ClinicForm.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- clinic` and confirm pass.

title: Edge: single weight degrades trend/velocity gracefully
steps: Produce a single-weight read
View /clinic/result
expected: Percentile/z-score and chart render; the trend section shows an EmptyState 'Add a second weight to see trend & velocity' instead of empty panels.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check the conditional: trend present → TrendCard, else EmptyState. Files: ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- ClinicResult`.

title: CLM edge: future DOB and out-of-range age rejected
steps: On /clinic/read enter a future DOB
Separately, enter a DOB making age > 24 months
expected: Inline plain-language messages: 'Date of birth can't be in the future' and 'Age is outside the WHO 0–24 month range'. No result produced.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check schema refinements for future-DOB and WHO_MAX_AGE_DAYS. Files: clinicSchema.ts. After fix: run `npm test -- clinicSchema`.

title: CLM edge: reversed and same-date weights handled
steps: Enter two weights where #2 date is before #1
Then make both dates equal
expected: Reversed: 'The second weight's date must be on or after the first'. Same-date: blocked with a message (velocity undefined).
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check date-order and same-date refinements. Files: clinicSchema.ts. After fix: run `npm test -- clinicSchema`.

title: CLM-4: implausible weight soft-warn (not hard block)
steps: Enter an implausible weight (e.g. 50 kg)
expected: A soft confirm/warn appears asking to confirm; a real edge value can still proceed after confirmation.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check soft-warn lives in the form UI, not the schema hard-block. Files: ClinicForm.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- ClinicForm`.

title: State: /clinic/result with no input redirects to /clinic/read
steps: Navigate directly to /clinic/result with no prior input (or refresh there)
expected: Redirects to /clinic/read; no crash, no stale result.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Check the !input||!read → <Navigate replace> guard. Files: ClinicResult.tsx. After fix: run `npm test -- ClinicResult`.

title: Contrast ≥ 4.5:1 on all clinic text
steps: Open each clinic screen
Run a contrast checker on all text incl. amber/green status
expected: All text meets ≥4.5:1 (≥3:1 for large/UI). Caution amber and accent green pass on their surfaces.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Use only MASTER tokens; check muted text on surface. Files: clinic screens. After fix: re-run contrast check.

title: Touch targets ≥ 44×44px on clinic controls
steps: Inspect CTAs, add/remove weight, SexSelector, New read
expected: All interactive elements have ≥44×44px hit area.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Reuse Button sizing; check custom controls. Files: clinic screens. After fix: re-inspect.

title: Status never conveyed by color alone
steps: View a below-3rd read and an on-track read
Inspect callout, TrendCard, projection
expected: Every amber/green status pairs color with an icon AND words.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Add icon + text to any color-only status. Files: callout, TrendCard. After fix: re-inspect.

title: Visible labels + keyboard nav on clinic form
steps: Tab through /clinic/read
Confirm each input has a visible label and a focus ring; SexSelector operable by keyboard
expected: All inputs labelled (not placeholder-only); focus ring visible; errors below fields; SexSelector keyboard-operable.
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. 2) Add <label>, focus-visible ring, key handlers. Files: ClinicForm.tsx. After fix: re-run keyboard pass.
